title: Gokulathu Radhai Vanthalo Lyrics Aanandham
stanzas:
Soodi thandha sudarkodiye
sugavelai nee varuga
thaedi konda thiraviyame
thaer maalai pola varuga
minnum ambu vizhi
chandhira pimbam
ponoli veesa
mangai myithili un
sandhana kaalgal
thandaigal aada
sangam soozha varuga
sri rangan thaazhai adaiya
valar thingalaagi varuga.

Gokulathu radhai vanthalo
indha kalyaana thaerile.
midhilinagar seethai vanthalo
indha veettodu vazhave.
indha  veettodu vazhave.

andha thenmadurai meenaal
vilakkaetra vandhaal
seethanamaai kaiyil
thaai paasam kondu vanthaal.

Gokulathu radhai vanthalo
indha kalyaana thaerile.
midhilinagar seethai vanthalo
indha veettodu vazhave.
indha  veettodu vazhave.

ponnu kondu vandha
seer vaangi vaikka
perusaa veedu onnu kattunga.

thanga maapillaiku
eedaaga neenga.
innum paththu madangu
kottunga.

thanga maapillaiyin
nenjil ammaanaiyaadi
selaiyila mudinji
jeyippaale enga ponnu.

moonu molam malligaipoovum
konjam halwavum podhume.
endha pennum aambala
nenjil ada thalsaanji mayangume

thanjavur bomma polathaan
unga mapaillathaan
thalayaattuvaar
dhesingu raja engannan
unga kudhira vaalaattumaa

hey thappaama enga ponnu
seivaale thandhiram
singathai katti podum
thalakaani mandhiram.

potiellaam potu pathomdi
adhu namakullathaanadi
jodiyathaan nallaa paaradi
madhura meenakshi sokkandi.

velli pani mutrathil
vetkam enum thottathil
malligai poothatho.
pudhu malligai pooththatho.

maadakuyil saththathil
manjal mugalaanathil
mangalam vandhatho
dhinam mangalam vandhatho

ini engal nenja koodathil
deepa thiruvizha
enga vaanil velicham
veesuthe chinna vennila

engal anbukku
annan panbukku
thendral sandhanam
poosudho.

engal veettukkul
veesum thendralaai
oru dhevathai vanthadho.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and devotion, celebrating the arrival of a beloved.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Aanandham.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The singer, lyricist, and music director for this song are currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 25, 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Gokulathu Radhai Vanthalo from the movie Aanandham beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and devotion. It portrays the arrival of a beloved, evoking feelings of joy and celebration. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics make it an ideal choice for weddings and festive occasions. This song resonates deeply with listeners, creating a sense of nostalgia and warmth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Gokulathu Radhai Vanthalo is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and devotion. This enchanting song from Aanandham beautifully intertwines heartfelt lyrics with soothing music, making it a perfect choice for weddings and celebrations. Experience the magic of this timeless classic that resonates with emotions and spirituality.
stanzaMeanings: Come, beautiful one, with your radiant charm, like a flower in bloom, bringing joy and happiness, like a shining moon, come to us, oh lovely one, with your sweet presence, like a beautiful garland, come to us, oh lovely one, with your sweet presence.
In this wedding chariot from Gokul, the bride has arrived from Mithilainagar, let her stay with us in this house, let her stay with us in this house.
If the fish from the sweet Madurai comes, it will bring love in its hands, like a mother.
In this wedding chariot from Gokul, the bride has arrived from Mithilainagar, let her stay with us in this house, let her stay with us in this house.
Bring the bride and set up a grand home for her.
For the golden groom, you are the one. Give him ten more gifts.
In the heart of the golden groom, there is a motherly love that will win over our daughter.
Three flowers, jasmine and a little sweetness are enough. Any girl will be enchanted by the heart of a man.
Your groom is like a Thanjavur doll, he will dance for you, where is your horse, oh king of the land?
Hey, our daughter will not be wronged, she will weave a magical spell that will bind the groom.
Let’s put everything together, this is for us, it’s a good match, look at the sweet Meenakshi, she is beautiful.
In the silver rain, the jasmine blooms in the garden. A new jasmine has bloomed.
The cuckoo sings in the yellow flowered fields, bringing good fortune every day.
Now, in our hearts, the festival of lights shines, our little moon brings brightness to the sky.
Is the breeze of love blowing in our affection?
Has a goddess come to our home as a breeze?
